title: Rename devis - Restore Defaults returns to official device name
scenario: Device name reverts to official name after Restore Defaults in Device Settings > General on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected Poly device (e.g., Voyager headset).
4. Tap on the device name field and rename the device to a custom name (e.g., "Voyager").
5. Confirm the rename and return to the Home screen.
6. Navigate back to Device Settings → General.
7. Tap on "Restore Defaults" (or "Reset to Defaults") to reset the device settings.
8. Observe the device name displayed after the restore operation.
expected: After restoring defaults, the device name should revert to its official name (e.g., "V" for Voyager).
